name: Auto Repair
title: AI Tools for Auto Repair Shops | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for auto repair shops — book appointments, send status updates, and bring customers back for service. Built in two weeks from $1,500.
hero_lede: The phone rings while you're under a car, customers want status updates, and last visit's customers forget to come back. We build the tools that handle the front desk so the bays stay productive.
drains: The phone ringing constantly while the team is in the bays
Customers calling all day asking 'is my car ready?'
Past customers who never come back for the next service
Approval delays on repairs holding up the work

tools.title: Appointment assistant
tools.body: Every call and form gets an instant reply and a booked appointment — service type, vehicle, drop-off time — so the phone stops pulling techs out of the bays.

tools.title: Repair-status assistant
tools.body: Customers get automatic updates — vehicle received, diagnosis ready, repair approved, ready for pickup — so the front desk isn't fielding status calls all day.

tools.title: Service-reminder assistant
tools.body: It reaches back out when a customer is due for an oil change, inspection, or seasonal service — turning one-time visits into a steady repeat base.

tools.title: Morning shop brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's appointments, bay load, parts due, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.before: The phone constantly pulled techs out of the bays to answer status calls.
cases.after: Customers get automatic status updates; bookings handled by an assistant.
cases.impact: Representative result: more productive bay time and a calmer front desk.

cases.context: A repair shop with weak repeat business.
cases.before: Customers came in once and were never reminded to return.
cases.after: Service reminders go out automatically when a vehicle is due.
cases.impact: Representative result: a steadier base of returning customers.

faq.q: Can it book appointments without the front desk?
faq.a: Yes. It captures the service type, vehicle, and drop-off time and books the appointment, so the phone stops pulling your techs off the work.

faq.q: How does it bring customers back?
faq.a: It tracks when each customer is due for routine service and reaches out at the right time, turning one-time visits into a predictable repeat base.

faq.q: Will it work with my shop software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of Shopmonkey, Tekmetric, Mitchell 1, or whatever you already run.
